title: rankdata/nanrankdata leak 1 reference per call on non-C-contiguous arrays
author: devdanzin

comments.author: neutrinoceros
comments.body:
bug and fix confirmed.

What surprised me though is that the following line
```py
a = (PyArrayObject *)PyArray_Ravel(a, NPY_CORDER);
```
appears in 4 other places that I *think* are equally incorrect, so I'm wondering if your tools just missed them (false negative) or there's something I'm not getting here (false positive on my side).

comments.author: neutrinoceros
comments.body: nevermind I was just not reading it right. The "4 other places" are *generated* from the ones you found, so we're all good.
